_comment: Baseline perf measurements for SimDrive Component 9 hardening pass.
_methodology: Measured on macOS with mocked backends (no real simulator/HID). Values reflect pure Python overhead of the observe/act/recorder dispatch chain including new observability log calls.

observe_dispatch.note: Time to execute observe() plumbing with mocked sim.screenshot; excludes actual screenshot capture

tap_dispatch.note: Time to execute tap() dispatch logic with mocked hid_inject; excludes actual HID injection

journey_loop_step.note: Time for one run_journey loop iteration with mocked LLM and tools
